✦Effect Desktop
✦Effect Desktop
Why Effect DesktopCapabilities

Surfaces

WindowsNative APIsRuntime

Reliability

ErrorsTestingPermissionsDevtools

Testing

Test desktop behavior without launching a desktop app.

Because native capabilities are ports, tests run the same Effect program against memory-backed services, mock host protocol clients, and deterministic event logs.

Test app behavior

Exercise the same save workflow with an in-memory filesystem and a fake host.

Test window intent

Assert the renderer asked for the right native operation without opening a real window.

Errors

Failures are typed values, attached to the operation that caused them.

Permissions

Dangerous operations require explicit, auditable approval.

On this page

Test app behaviorTest window intent
